description: Symvanta hooks. SessionStart injects standing context once. A family of non-blocking augmenters (on by default) adds graph context around tool use: PreToolUse on Grep/Glob injects matching symbol definitions; PreToolUse on Edit/Write injects the edited symbol's blast radius; PreToolUse on Read injects a first-read-per-session file skeleton plus decision records; PostToolUse on Grep suggests graph candidates only when the search came back empty; UserPromptSubmit looks up identifier-shaped terms from the message (never the message text). Auth reuses the stored Symvanta MCP token only, never your Anthropic token; SYMVANTA_MCP_TOKEN supplies your own instead. Hooks can only ADD context, never block, delay-to-failure, or interrupt a tool: every error or timeout is a clean pass-through. Only extracted identifier terms, matched symbol names, and repo-relative paths are sent, never file contents or prompt text. Controls: SYMVANTA_AUGMENT=off (or legacy SYMVANTA_GREP_AUGMENT=off) disables the whole family; per hook: SYMVANTA_EDIT_AUGMENT / SYMVANTA_READ_AUGMENT / SYMVANTA_GREP_RESCUE / SYMVANTA_PROMPT_AUGMENT=off.
